title: File read automation
excerpt:

posts.author: Donna (Donna Bruce)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very helpful to be able to base automations on a file being read by a user.

for example - I store minutes from meetings on a board and it would be great to check a box per user to say they have read them, but that it would automatically check the box once they have opened the file (so that they do not abuse the function)
